title: pasania listeri
intro: Pasania listeri, a species of plant, is a type of deciduous tree that belongs to the family Meliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pasania listeri include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pasania listeri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
